Draught & Leak Repairs

This page is for leaking aluminium windows, cold draughts, wind noise and early-stage water entry problems across Wellington. If the joinery is still serviceable but no longer sealing properly, this is where the repair starts.

Common symptoms

Cold air movement, noisy frames, damp carpet, blackened seals, visible water tracking and windows that no longer close down tightly.

What we do

We work out whether the issue is wedges, seals, latch pressure, sash alignment or a deeper mitre and sill fault and then repair the right layer.

What happens next

Tell us where the leak or draught is showing up and whether it is worst in wind, heavy rain or all the time. That usually narrows the diagnosis quickly.

Searches we commonly help with

People usually land here from searches like leaking aluminium windows, reseal aluminium windows, draughty aluminium windows, window leak repair Wellington, leaking ranchslider, leaking sliding door and seal replacement for aluminium windows. This page supports that wider leak and sealing cluster before the job gets more serious.

Mitre and sill reseals Window repairs Sliding door repairs

Get a quote for draught or leak repairs

Best for leaking aluminium windows, tired wedges and seals, rattling sashes and early-stage water ingress before major damage sets in.

What we usually find

Where we work

We attend draught and leak jobs across Central Wellington, Porirua, Lower Hutt, Upper Hutt, Petone and Kapiti.

Leak repair FAQs

Can you fix leaking aluminium windows without replacing the whole window?

Yes. Many leak problems come down to failed wedges, worn seals, latch misalignment, dropped sashes or localised mitre and sill faults rather than full replacement.

Do you repair draughty aluminium windows as well as obvious leaks?

Yes. We fix cold draughts, noisy windows and rattling sashes by replacing wedges and seals, servicing latches and correcting sash fitment.

Do you work on single and double glazed joinery?

Yes. We service both single and double glazed aluminium windows and doors across Wellington and the Hutt Valley.
